metadata.title: Contact Xpandia | Start a Language Quality Conversation
metadata.description: Contact Xpandia to discuss Spanish and English Language Assurance, Language Experience Repair, Applied Cultural Intelligence, AI QA sprint, launch readiness, or quality advisory support.
metadata.ogTitle: Contact Xpandia | Start a Language Quality Conversation
metadata.ogDescription: Contact Xpandia to discuss Spanish and English Language Assurance, Language Experience Repair, Applied Cultural Intelligence, AI QA sprint, launch readiness, or quality advisory support.

hero.headline: Tell us what your team is building, launching, or improving in Spanish/English.
hero.body: Use the form below or email us directly. We'll review your request and recommend the best next step: a diagnostic call, audit, Language repair engagement, ACI talk, messaging review, workshop, or advisory path.

form.title: Let's talk about your Spanish/English products.
form.intro: Share a few details about your product, audience, language, surface, and timeline. We'll use this context to recommend the right next step.

service.label: What do you need help with?

message.label: Tell us about your product, audience, language, surface, website or product URL, and what you'd like us to look at.
message.placeholder: Example: We launched our AI tutor in Spanish last quarter. Support tickets mention confusion. We need an expert read on quality before expanding to Mexico.

form.microcopy: We'll review your request and respond with the most relevant next step.
form.success: ✓ Request received — we'll reply within 24 hours
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at hello@xpandia.global

whatHappensNext.headline: A clear path from first contact to <u>action</u>.

steps.title: Share your context
steps.body: Tell us what your team is building, improving, validating, or launching in Spanish.

steps.title: Get a recommendation
steps.body: We identify the right starting point based on your product, audience, timeline, and business goal.

steps.title: Scope the engagement
steps.body: We define deliverables, timing, pricing, inputs needed, and success criteria.

steps.title: Move forward with clarity
steps.body: Your team gets the expert judgment, assets, evidence, or guidance needed to act with confidence.

finalCta.headline: Let's find the right Spanish/English quality path for your team.
finalCta.body: Whether you need to validate AI outputs, repair Spanish/English content, prepare for launch, train a global team, or understand a Hispanic audience, Xpandia can help you choose the right next step.
